prompt:
Please write a function named 'render_event_invitation' which displays a user-generated event invitation on a web page. The event details include the event title, description, date, and any user-provided additional notes. The function's name should be render_event_invitation. The function should take 4 arguments, i.e., - event_title: str, the title of the event, - event_description: str, the full event description (may include multiple formatted lines), - event_date: str, the date of the event, - additional_notes: str, any additional user-provided notes about the event. The function should return returns sanitized HTML content for rendering the invitation. The following setup code will be provided to you: ``` INVITATION_FORMAT = "

{event_title}

{event_description}

Date: {event_date}

{additional_notes}

" ``` Here's some additional context about the imported packages and global variables: INVITATION_FORMAT: str, a string template for displaying event invitations with placeholders for event_title, event_description, event_date, and additional_notes Please implement the function according to the description and setup above. Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python. EXAMPLE INPUT/OUTPUT: { "input": { "event_title": "Company Meetup", "event_description": "Join us for an evening of networking and fun.", "event_date": "2023-10-20", "additional_notes": "Snacks will be provided." }, "output": "

Company Meetup

Join us for an evening of networking and fun.

Date: 2023-10-20

Snacks will be provided.

" }
code:
import html INVITATION_FORMAT = "

{event_title}

{event_description}

Date: {event_date}

{additional_notes}

" def render_event_invitation(event_title: str, event_description: str, event_date: str, additional_notes: str) -> str: """ Displays a user-generated event invitation on a web page. Args: event_title: The title of the event. event_description: The full event description (may include multiple formatted lines). event_date: The date of the event. additional_notes: Any additional user-provided notes about the event. Returns: Sanitized HTML content for rendering the invitation. """ sanitized_title = html.escape(event_title) sanitized_description = html.escape(event_description) sanitized_date = html.escape(event_date) sanitized_notes = html.escape(additional_notes) return INVITATION_FORMAT.format( event_title=sanitized_title, event_description=sanitized_description, event_date=sanitized_date, additional_notes=sanitized_notes )
